name: Mexican Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except cheese in a large bowl.
2. Heat a greased iron skillet over medium heat.
3. Pour half of the mixture into the pan.
4. Sprinkle half of the grated cheese on top, then pour the remaining mixture over it.
5. Sprinkle the rest of the cheese on top.
6. Bake for 35 minutes at 350°F.
7. Cool for at least 30 minutes before cutting.
